golden_categories.name: Basic URL Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating standard URLs with or without protocols, including basic syntax and structure.

golden_categories.name: Custom Protocols and Schemes
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with custom or non-standard protocols and schemes.

golden_categories.name: Underscores and Trailing Dots
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with underscores or trailing dots in the domain.

golden_categories.name: Port Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with specific port requirements or formats.

golden_categories.name: Protocol and Fragment Options
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with specific protocol, fragment, or query component requirements.

golden_categories.name: Authentication in URLs
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with or without authentication information.

golden_categories.name: Host and Domain Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with specific host and domain requirements, including whitelists and blacklists.

golden_categories.name: Security and Vulnerability Checks
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs against potential security vulnerabilities or malicious patterns.

golden_categories.name: Length Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs based on their length, including maximum length configurations.

generated_categories.name: Default Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests the basic URL validation behavior with default options.

generated_categories.name: Protocol Requirements
generated_categories.description: Validates URLs with specific protocol-related constraints.

generated_categories.name: Top-Level Domain Handling
generated_categories.description: Tests the handling of URLs with or without top-level domains.

generated_categories.name: Hostname Customization
generated_categories.description: Validates URLs with custom hostname rules, such as allowing underscores or trailing dots.

generated_categories.name: Authentication Handling
generated_categories.description: Ensures proper validation of URLs with or without authentication components.

generated_categories.name: Length Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests the behavior of the validator when length validation is disabled.

golden_to_generated.reason: Both categories focus on basic URL validation with default options, including standard protocols and syntax.
Both categories emphasize protocol-related constraints and validation, including custom and non-standard protocols.
Both categories address hostname customization, specifically allowing underscores and trailing dots.
No generated category explicitly focuses on port validation.
GENC-2 partially overlaps with GC-5 by addressing protocol requirements, but does not cover fragment or query component validation.
Both categories focus on authentication handling in URLs, including validation with or without authentication components.
No generated category explicitly addresses host and domain validation, including whitelists and blacklists.
No generated category explicitly focuses on security and vulnerability checks for URLs.
Both categories focus on length validation for URLs, including configurations for maximum length or disabling length validation.

generated_to_golden.reason: GENC-1 aligns with GC-1 in testing basic URL validation with default options.
GENC-2 strongly matches GC-2 for protocol validation but partially overlaps with GC-5 by addressing protocol requirements without covering fragments or query components.
GENC-3 partially overlaps with GC-1 by addressing top-level domain handling, which is a subset of basic URL validation.
GENC-4 aligns with GC-3 in validating URLs with underscores and trailing dots in the domain.
GENC-5 aligns with GC-6 in handling authentication validation for URLs.
GENC-6 aligns with GC-9 in testing URL length validation behavior.
